title: EMGS: Summons for written resolution in relation to Elec ASA 18/25 FRN USD FLOOR STEP C CONV
description: Reference is made to the stock exchange notification published by Electromagnetic Geoservices ASA ("EMGS" or the "Company") on 31 March 2026 announcing a binding transaction agreement (the "Transaction Agreement") between the Company and P-2 Riggs Capital, Inc. ("Riggs Capital" or the "Buyer"), under which Riggs Capital will acquire EMGS' business operations and assets, including hardware, IPR, contractual positions and all of the Company's employees (the "Transaction").

title: Virtune Expands in Poland with First-Ever Crypto Index ETP on the Warsaw Stock Exchange
description: Warsaw, April 8, 2026 – Virtune, the Swedish regulated crypto asset manager, today announces the listing of the Virtune Coinbase 50 Index ETP on the Warsaw Stock Exchange (GPW), marking the first-ever crypto index ETP listed in Poland and traded in PLN.

title: Global Power Solutions Signs LOI to Evaluate Data Centre Power Development that Could Support Up to 100 MW of Decentralized Energy Infrastructure in North America
description: Vancouver, BC, Canada, April 08, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Global Power Solutions Corp. (TSXV: PWER) (FSE: NJA) (“Global” or the “Company) is pleased to announce that it has entered into a non-binding Letter of Intent (“LOI”) with North American Data Centers and Power Ltd. title: GigaOm names Nokia “Leader" and "Outperformer” in Data Center Switching for fifth straight year
description: Nokia named Leader and Outperformer in GigaOm 2026 Radar Report for Data Center Switching for 5th straight year

title: INVL Asset Management fund raises EUR 27.8 million for investment in the European technology sector
description: INVL Asset Management, the leading Baltic alternative asset manager, has successfully completed the fundraising for its feeder fund, European Software Private Equity Access Fund. The fund raised EUR 27.8 million from 85 investors. The capital will be managed by the Netherlands-based Main Capital Partners private equity fund focused on business-to-business (B2B) software companies in Northern and Western Europe.

title: „INVL Asset Management" fondas investicijoms į Europos technologijų sektorių pritraukė 27,8 mln. eurų
description: Pirmaujanti alternatyvaus turto valdytoja Baltijos šalyse „INVL Asset Management" sėkmingai užbaigė finansuojančiojo (angl. feeder) fondo „European Software Private Equity Access Fund" lėšų pritraukimą. Fondas pritraukė 27,8 mln. eurų iš 85 investuotojų. Lėšas valdys Nyderlandų „Main Capital Partners" privataus kapitalo fondas, kuris orientuojasi į programinės įrangos verslui (B2B) kūrėjus Šiaurės ir Vakarų Europoje.
